title: clinopodium calamintha
intro: Clinopodium calamintha, also known as mountain mint, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium calamintha include soothing digestive issues, relieving stress and anxiety, and reducing fever. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried and used in potpourri or added to skincare products for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
